heading: Plugin Skills ({{count}})
descriptionStart: Skills shipped by Claude Code plugins under
descriptionMiddle: Nakiros lists every folder and file as-is, without assuming any particular skill layout.
auditResumeTooltip: An audit is already running for this skill — click to resume
auditTooltip: Run an audit of this skill (uses nakiros-skill-factory)
fixResumeTooltip: A fix session is already running for this skill — click to resume
fixTooltip: Apply fixes to this skill based on the latest audit + eval results + feedback
fixNoAuditTooltip: Run an audit first — fix relies on its report
baselineTooltip: Also run each eval without the skill loaded, to measure real skill value via delta
